title: Simplest Watering Can
description: Watering can that hydrate and fertilize your crops
body:
# About

**Tired of slow and mundane farming? Use a watering can!**

This mod adds a watering can that hydrates farmland and accelerates crop growth in a 3x3 area, making farming faster and less tedious.

# FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Watering Can to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Watering Can to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
